author: Shintaro Fushida-Hardy
title: Parity vision
rules: "Standard 6x6 sudoku rules apply.\n\nA given cell \"sees\" a digit if the digit lies in the direction of an arrow on the cell. Each cell with arrows counts the number of digits it sees with the same parity as itself."
